title: Nestle plans sale of ice cream business as fourth-quarter sales growth beats estimates
summary: Nestle shares rose 3% Thursday after the maker of Nescafé and KitKat reported organic sales growth for the fourth quarter that beat analyst forecasts.

title: Are prediction markets superior to financial markets?
summary: When it comes to forecasting Fed rate decisions, the answer is narrowly ‘yes’

title: UK should replace fiscal rules with ‘traffic light’ system, says think-tank
summary: Under proposal, OBR watchdog would produce forecasts for up to 10 indicators to overhaul ‘dysfunctional’ policymaking
